components.name: JarCard
components.description: Displays a single jar card with balance, budget info, and quick stats. Supports accumulative/reset modes with live preview of percentage changes.

props.name: jar
props.description: Jar object with name, type, percent, fixedAmount, refresh_mode, active properties

props.name: balance
props.description: Balance object with asignado, gastado, ajuste, retiros, transfers_in/out, leverage_in/out, saldo_anterior

props.name: useRealIncome
props.description: Use real income (true) or expected income (false)

keyFeatures: Real-time balance display with progress bar
Carry-over amount tracking for accumulative jars

components.name: JarsBalanceBar
components.description: Horizontal scrollable bar showing quick summary of all jar balances for the current period. Color-coded by status (ok, warning, negative).
keyFeatures: Auto-loads on mount and when period changes

components.name: ExpenseDistributionChart
components.description: Displays two ECharts visualizations: pie chart showing budget distribution by jar, and bar chart comparing assigned vs spent vs balance.

props.name: rows
props.description: Array of jar data with id, name, color, assignedExpected, spent, balance

props.name: hideValues
props.description: When true, shows '••••••' instead of amounts

components.name: TransactionForm
components.description: Form component for creating/editing transactions. Handles name, amount, datetime, account selection, and optional file upload.

components.name: TransactionCreateDialog
components.description: Dialog wrapper for creating new transactions. Likely wraps TransactionForm in a Q-Dialog.
keyFeatures: Clean separation of form from modal

components.name: AccountsTree
components.description: Hierarchical tree component for managing accounts and folders. Supports drag & drop, inline actions, and multi-folder nesting.

components.name: CategoriesTree
components.description: Hierarchical tree for managing transaction categories. Supports filtering, drag & drop, and multi-column layout for large lists.

props.name: columnsCount
props.description: Number of columns for multi-column layout

keyFeatures: Advanced filtering by name and type
Drag & drop to root and between folders

components.name: CrudPage
components.description: Generic CRUD page wrapper with data table, filters, search, export, and create/edit/delete dialogs.

props.name: dictionary
props.description: Configuration object with title, buttonNewLabel, finderLabel, forms_filter, columns

components.name: PeriodFilterBar
components.description: Period selector bar with tabs (Day, Week, Month, Year, All, Custom) and navigation arrows. Responsive: tabs on desktop, dropdown on mobile.

components.name: MonthlyIncomePanel
components.description: Card component showing expected vs real income, total assigned, and fulfillment percentage. Inline editing of expected income.

internals.api: Likely PATCH for saving expected income

keyFeatures: Inline edit mode for expected income
Real-time calculation of difference and fulfillment %

components.name: BigJarSidebar
components.description: Visual jar representation showing stacked segments proportional to each jar's percentage allocation. Used in sidebar or detail views.
keyFeatures: Deterministic color generation from jar name
Handles mixed percent + fixed jar types

components.name: AccountDialog
components.description: Dialog for creating/editing account details. Wraps account form.

components.name: CategoryDialog
components.description: Dialog for creating/editing category details. Wraps category form.

components.name: TransactionEditDialog
components.description: Dialog for editing existing transactions. Similar to TransactionCreateDialog but for edit mode.

components.name: TransactionBulkImportDialog
components.description: Dialog for bulk importing transactions from file or CSV.

components.name: VersionBadge
components.description: Small badge component showing app version (Lite/Pro).

components.name: AdjustmentModal
components.description: Modal for adjusting jar balance (manual adjustments).

components.name: AccountViewerDialog
components.description: Read-only dialog for viewing account details and transaction history.

components.name: AccountsSidebarWidget
components.description: Compact account summary widget for sidebars. Likely shows quick account balances.

components.name: OnboardingModal
components.description: First-run onboarding flow for new users.

components.name: TransactionFormDialog
components.description: Wrapper combining TransactionForm in a dialog.

components.name: EssentialLink
components.description: Navigation link component, likely used in drawers/navigation.

components.name: ExampleComponent
components.description: Placeholder/example component from Quasar template.

uiComponents.name: simple-css-chart
uiComponents.description: CSS-only chart (no ECharts) for lightweight displays.

uiComponents.name: glass-fab
uiComponents.description: Floating action button with glassmorphism design.

uiComponents.name: swipeable-bottom-sheet
uiComponents.description: Mobile-friendly bottom sheet with swipe gestures.

liquidComponents.name: LiquidFAB
liquidComponents.description: Floating action button in Liquid design system.

liquidComponents.name: LiquidBalanceCard
liquidComponents.description: Balance card in Liquid design system.

liquidComponents.name: LiquidTransactionItem
liquidComponents.description: Transaction list item in Liquid design.

liquidComponents.name: LiquidJarCard
liquidComponents.description: Jar card variant for Lite version.

liquidComponents.name: LiquidBottomNavNew
liquidComponents.description: Updated bottom navigation for Liquid design.

liquidComponents.name: QuickActionSheet
liquidComponents.description: Quick action menu sheet for Lite version.

liquidComponents.name: LiteHomeView
liquidComponents.description: Main home view for Lite version using Liquid design.

otherComponents.name: TransactionPalette
otherComponents.description: Component for displaying transaction category palette or quick selection.

keyArchitecturalPatterns: Liquid design variant for Lite version
